---
title: "Samuel"
subtitle: "Student"
image: profile.jpg
about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/samholbrook92801/portfolio
---

Portfolio

## Education

California State University, Fullerton \| Fullerton, CA \| Sept 2023 - June 2026
